sentences.target: La cloche résonne dans la cour.

translations.fr: La cloche résonne dans la cour.
translations.en: The bell echoes in the courtyard.
translations.es: La campana resuena en el patio.
translations.vi: Tiếng chuông vang lên trong sân.
translations.nl: De bel galmt op de binnenplaats.
translations.hi: घंटी की आवाज़ आंगन में गूंजती है.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'cloche' as the subject.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'La cloche' and denotes reverberating sound.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'cour' as object of the preposition.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans' indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu entends la musique résonner au loin.
sentences.reading: /ty ɑ̃.tɑ̃ la my.zik ʁe.zɔ.ne o lwɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu entends la musique résonner au loin.
translations.ipa: /ty ɑ̃.tɑ̃ la my.zik ʁe.zɔ.ne o lwɛ̃/
translations.en: You hear the music echoing in the distance.
translations.es: Escuchas la música que resuena a lo lejos.
translations.de: Du hörst die Musik in der Ferne hallen.
translations.it: Senti la musica riecheggiare in lontananza.
translations.ko: 멀리서 음악이 울려 퍼지는 게 들린다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你听到音乐在远方回荡。
translations.yue: 你聽到音樂在遠方迴盪。
translations.ru: Ты слышишь, как музыка отдается вдали.
translations.pt: Você ouve a música ecoar ao longe.
translations.he: אתה שומע את המוזיקה מהדהדת במרחק.
translations.vi: Bạn nghe tiếng nhạc vang vọng ở đằng xa.
translations.nl: Je hoort de muziek in de verte galmen.
translations.uk: Ти чуєш, як музика лунає вдалині.
translations.hu: Hallod, ahogy a zene a távolban visszhangzik.
translations.hi: तुम दूर से संगीत की गूंज सुनते हो.
translations.pl: Słyszysz muzykę, która rozbrzmiewa w oddali.
translations.el: Ακούς τη μουσική να αντηχεί από μακριά.
translations.nb: Du hører musikken gi gjenlyd i det fjerne.
translations.id: Kamu mendengar musik bergema dari kejauhan.
translations.sv: Du hör musiken eka i fjärran.
translations.cs: Slyšíš hudbu, jak se ozývá v dálce.
translations.da: Du hører musikken genlyde i det fjerne.
translations.ja: 遠くで音楽が響いているのが聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'entends'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes 'la musique' as direct object and an infinitival complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'musique' as direct object of 'entends'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'entends'.
Infinitive functioning as a complement of perception ('entends'), indicating the action perceived.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the adverbial locative phrase 'au loin' ('in the distance').
Adverb within the fixed expression 'au loin', forming an adverbial complement meaning 'in the distance'.

sentences.target: Nos pas résonnent dans l’escalier vide.

translations.fr: Nos pas résonnent dans l’escalier vide.
translations.en: Our footsteps echo in the empty stairwell.
translations.es: Nuestros pasos resuenan en la escalera vacía.
translations.de: Unsere Schritte hallen im leeren Treppenhaus.
translations.it: I nostri passi riecheggiano nella scala vuota.
translations.ko: 우리 발소리가 텅 빈 계단에 울려 퍼진다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的脚步在空荡的楼梯间回响。
translations.yue: 我們的腳步聲在空曠的樓梯間迴盪。
translations.ru: Наши шаги эхом раздаются в пустой лестничной клетке.
translations.pt: Nossos passos ecoam na escada vazia.
translations.he: צעדים שלנו מהדהדים בחדר המדרגות הריק.
translations.vi: Bước chân của chúng tôi vang trong cầu thang vắng.
translations.nl: Onze stappen galmen in het lege trappenhuis.
translations.uk: Наші кроки лунають у порожній сходовій клітці.
translations.hi: हमारे कदमों की आवाज़ खाली सीढ़ियों में गूंजती है.
translations.pl: Nasze kroki rozbrzmiewają w pustej klatce schodowej.
translations.el: Τα βήματά μας αντηχούν στο άδειο κλιμακοστάσιο.
translations.nb: Våre skritt runger i den tomme trappeoppgangen.
translations.id: Langkah kaki kami bergema di tangga yang kosong.
translations.sv: Våra steg ekar i den tomma trappuppgången.
translations.ro: Pașii noștri răsună în casa scărilor goală.
translations.cs: Naše kroky se rozléhají v prázdném schodišti.
translations.da: Vores skridt genlyder i den tomme opgang.
translations.ja: 私たちの足音ががらんとした階段に響く。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person plural, plural form; modifies 'pas' (our).
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the subject noun phrase ('Nos pas').
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Nos pas'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article with elision before a vowel-initial noun; determiner for 'escalier' as object of the preposition.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'dans'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'escalier'.

sentences.target: Les murs résonnent après le concert.

translations.fr: Les murs résonnent après le concert.
translations.en: The walls echo after the concert.
translations.es: Las paredes resuenan después del concierto.
translations.de: Die Wände hallen nach dem Konzert.
translations.it: Le pareti riecheggiano dopo il concerto.
translations.zh-Hans: 音乐会结束后墙壁仍在回响。
translations.yue: 音樂會結束後牆壁仍在迴盪。
translations.pt: As paredes ecoam após o concerto.
translations.vi: Sau buổi hòa nhạc, những bức tường vẫn vang vọng.
translations.ar: يتردد الصدى في الجدران بعد الحفل.
translations.nl: De muren galmen na het concert.
translations.hu: A falak visszhangzanak a koncert után.
translations.hi: कॉन्सर्ट के बाद दीवारें गूंजती रहती हैं.
translations.el: Οι τοίχοι αντηχούν μετά τη συναυλία.
translations.ja: コンサートのあとも壁が響いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner for 'murs' as the subject.
Common noun, masculine plural; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Les murs'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'concert' as object of the preposition.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'après' indicating the time reference.
